app.name: Essenly
app.tagline: Your AI K-Beauty Guide in Korea

landing.title: Discover K-Beauty, Tailored to You
landing.subtitle: AI-powered recommendations for skincare, treatments, and more — personalized to your skin type, concerns, and travel plans.
landing.pathADescription: Chat with our AI guide and get instant recommendations
landing.pathBDescription: Answer a few quick questions first for personalized picks
landing.ctaDescription: Chat with our AI guide — no signup needed
landing.step1Desc: Tell us what you're looking for — our AI finds the best picks instantly
landing.step2Desc: Our AI finds the best products, clinics, and treatments for your unique profile
landing.step3Desc: Every recommendation comes with map links and booking options — ready to go
landing.benefitProductsDesc: Skincare & beauty products picked for your skin type
landing.benefitMapDesc: Direct links to navigate and reserve
landing.benefitKitDesc: A personalized starter kit matched to your profile
landing.trustSubtitle: Essenly is free to use. No signup, no tracking, no data selling.
landing.trustNoShareDesc: Your data stays between you and AI
landing.returnDescription: Your beauty profile is ready. Pick up where you left off.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introBody: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Essenly website and AI-powered K-beauty recommendation service. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.serviceBody: Essenly is an AI-powered K-beauty recommendation platform that provides personalized skincare, treatment, and shopping suggestions for travelers visiting Korea. The service is provided free of charge and does not require account registration for basic use.
terms.useBody: You agree to use Essenly only for its intended purpose of receiving K-beauty recommendations. You must not misuse the service, attempt to access it through unauthorized means, or use it in any way that could damage or impair the service.
terms.disclaimerIntro: Please read this section carefully before using our recommendation service.
terms.disclaimerMedicalBody: Essenly provides AI-generated beauty and skincare recommendations for informational purposes only. Our recommendations are not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of information provided by Essenly. For any medical skin condition or concern, please consult a licensed dermatologist or healthcare professional.
terms.disclaimerAccuracyBody: While we strive to provide helpful and relevant recommendations, AI-generated suggestions may not be suitable for every individual. Product availability, pricing, clinic services, and business hours may change without notice. Always verify current information directly with the provider before making purchases or booking appointments.
terms.disclaimerLiabilityBody: Essenly and its operators shall not be held liable for any adverse reactions, allergic responses, unsatisfactory treatments, or financial losses resulting from following our recommendations. You use our recommendations at your own risk and discretion.
terms.disclaimerThirdPartyBody: Essenly may provide links and references to third-party businesses including clinics, stores, and treatment providers. We do not endorse, guarantee, or assume responsibility for any third-party services. Any transactions or interactions with third parties are solely between you and the third party.
terms.dataBody: Your use of Essenly is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms or to request data deletion, please contact us at {email}. We will respond within {days} business days.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.governingBody: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of the Republic of Korea.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introBody: Essenly is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal information. We follow the principles of Korea's Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) and key GDPR principles including transparency and the right to deletion.
privacy.collectionIntro: We collect only the minimum data necessary to provide personalized recommendations:
privacy.collectionProfile: Beauty profile information you provide (skin type, concerns, preferences) — collected during onboarding or chat
privacy.collectionTravel: Travel information (country of origin, length of stay, budget) — collected during onboarding or chat
privacy.collectionChat: Chat conversation history — stored to maintain context and improve recommendations
privacy.collectionEmail: Email address — only if you voluntarily submit it for the K-Beauty Kit offer
privacy.collectionNot: We do not collect location data, browsing behavior, or analytics in the current version.
privacy.consentIntro: We obtain your explicit consent before collecting data:
privacy.consentRetention: Data storage consent — required before starting the service, collected when you begin your first chat
privacy.consentMarketing: Marketing consent — optional, collected only if you submit your email for the K-Beauty Kit offer
privacy.useRecommendations: To provide personalized K-beauty recommendations based on your profile
privacy.useContext: To maintain conversation context for better follow-up suggestions
privacy.useKit: To deliver the K-Beauty Kit if you opt in (email only)
privacy.useNoSelling: We never sell, share, or provide your personal data to third parties.
privacy.retentionAnonymous: Anonymous users: Your data is automatically deleted after {days} days of inactivity. This includes your profile, conversations, and all associated records.
privacy.retentionSession: Session data (current time, temporary context): Deleted when your session ends.
privacy.retentionDerived: Derived beauty variables: Recalculated on demand, not stored permanently.
privacy.deletionIntro: You can request deletion of your data at any time through the following methods:
privacy.deletionAuto: Automatic expiry — Stop using the service, and your data will be automatically deleted after {days} days of inactivity.
privacy.deletionEmail: Email request — Send a deletion request to {email}. We will process your request within {processingDays} business days. Please include the email address you used for the K-Beauty Kit (if applicable) so we can identify your account.
privacy.deletionAnonymousNote: If you are an anonymous user who has not provided an email address, automatic expiry is the deletion method available to you, as we have no way to identify your specific data.
privacy.deletionScope: When your data is deleted, all associated records are permanently removed, including your profile, conversations, messages, preferences, and consent records.
privacy.securityBody: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption and access controls provided by our infrastructure partner. Access to personal data is restricted to authorized systems only.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or data deletion requests, contact us at {email}. We will respond within {processingDays} business days.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this policy to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
